info.title: Z3r0 - A controlled multi-agent workbench for authorized security assessment, code auditing, internal review, and controlled research.

get.summary: Get Work Project Record Snapshot Route

patch.summary: Update Agent Session Sandbox Container Route

owner_id.title: Owner Id
owner_id.description: Assign container owner user ID. Admin only; defaults to the creator.

task_id.title: Task Id
task_id.description: Related WorkProject task id when known.

task_title.title: Task Title
task_title.description: Related task title when task_id is unavailable.

progress.title: Progress
progress.description: This agent's subtask progress from 0 to 100 with at most two decimals.

status.title: Status
status.description: Current live status of this agent's work.

findings.title: Findings
findings.description: Confirmed findings or valuable negative results.

decisions.title: Decisions
decisions.description: Decisions or scope changes made by this agent.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Brief extra context that does not fit other fields.

WorkProjectAssetExtraSchema.title: WorkProjectAssetExtraSchema
WorkProjectAssetExtraSchema.description: Recon metadata attached to an asset. Kept small on purpose.

assignee.title: Assignee
assignee.description: Agent code or owner responsible for this task.

progress.title: Progress
progress.description: Task progress from 0 to 100 with at most two decimals.
